name: dev-kit
description: Development workflow plugin with a unified clarify-plan-execute-review flow, JSON-backed session state, hooks, debugging, and code quality skills

interface.shortDescription: Unified development workflow: clarify, plan, execute, review, debug
interface.longDescription: A development workflow plugin centered on a single visible flow: clarify, planning, execute, and review. Session state is stored under .dev-kit/ as JSON, human-readable artifacts stay beside that state, and hooks surface the active session summary at startup and prompt submit. Includes debugging and code-quality disciplines.
defaultPrompt: Clarify this task, create a plan, execute it, and review the result.
Debug this failing test with systematic root-cause analysis.
Review and simplify the changed code for quality issues.
